text.font-family: 'Segoe Print', 'Bradley Hand', 'Comic Sans MS', 'Caveat', 'Patrick Hand', cursive, sans-serif
text.tspan: The Hash Chain — why tampering breaks everything

text.font-family: 'Segoe Print', 'Bradley Hand', 'Comic Sans MS', 'Caveat', 'Patrick Hand', cursive, sans-serif
text.tspan: Every fact points backward at the one before via parent_hash. Editing any fact poisons the chain from that point.

text.tspan: To cover the forgery, the attacker would need to re-sign every subsequent fact — but that requires the private key, which they don't have.
